overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rain-soaked cyberpunk city street at night, featuring dense neon signage with Japanese text, reflective wet surfaces, and futuristic architecture. The footage is from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the atmospheric Night City environment with ray-traced neon lighting and hazy rain effects.

events.description: moving from fully covered sidewalk section to partially open area approaching the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to a graffiti-covered wall, approaching an intersection with neon signs ahead

notable_agents.action: person with blue umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: Red neon sign with Japanese text '24時間営業' above a doorway
Staircase leading up to a higher level on the left side
Overhead concrete structure providing partial cover over the sidewalk
Concrete wall covered in black graffiti tags and street art
Metal railing separating sidewalk from the street
Blue neon sign reading 'HOTEL' in English and Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked covered sidewalk bordered by a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the left and a metal guardrail on the right. A prominent red neon sign indicates a 24-hour business above a doorway as the camera approaches an intersection with visible hotel signage in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and neon advertising

events.description: exiting the covered sidewalk and stepping into the open intersection crosswalk
crossing the street alongside other pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and walking across the wet intersection with other pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with red illuminated umbrella crossing the street ahead
white van driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: Wide pedestrian crosswalk with yellow striped markings on wet asphalt
Large vertical digital screen displaying advertisements high above the street

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide intersection on yellow-striped crosswalk markings, moving from the sheltered sidewalk into the open street. The wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights including a prominent blue hotel sign, while pedestrians with glowing umbrellas cross in the same direction and vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with pharmacy and convenience stores

events.description: entering a covered underpass area with overhead concrete structure and fluorescent lighting
passing under a dark overpass section with reduced ambient light and green neon reflections

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under covered walkways, passing groups of pedestrians near storefront entrances

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing and conversing near the pharmacy entrance

entered.detail: Covered section of sidewalk with overhead concrete ceiling and fluorescent lighting
Bright blue and white neon sign for Grand Imperial Pharmacy

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk on the opposite side of the street, passing through covered walkway sections and under overpasses. The area features commercial storefronts including a pharmacy with bright blue signage, while small groups of pedestrians gather near entrances and the street is lined with parked vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway transition to elevated walkway

events.description: beginning to ascend the concrete stairs to reach the upper level walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs with metal railings to reach the upper pedestrian walkway level

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket descending the stairs in the opposite direction

entered.detail: Flight of concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward to the elevated walkway
Large illuminated advertisement screen showing 'MIX IT UP' with a beverage product
Purple neon sign with Japanese text '天狗' and 'TENGU' in English

segments.scene_description: Ascending a flight of concrete stairs with metal railings, transitioning from street level to an upper pedestrian walkway. Large digital advertisements including a 'MIX IT UP' billboard and a purple 'TENGU' neon sign become visible at the top of the stairs, while a pedestrian descends in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking the main street intersection

events.description: reaching the top of the stairs and entering the elevated pedestrian walkway with city views

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway overlooking the street below, observing the neon-lit cityscape and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: person in red jacket standing near a concrete column looking down at the street view

entered.detail: Green metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated pedestrian walkway
Large suspended digital billboard displaying animated advertisements above the street level
Brightly lit vending machine with orange glow against the building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway with green safety railings overlooking the street below. The perspective offers views of the intersection, surrounding neon-lit buildings, and passing vehicles, while the path continues under overhead digital screens and past a brightly lit vending machine.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, rain-slicked sidewalk through a bustling city intersection and up onto an elevated pedestrian walkway. It begins along a covered path bordered by graffiti-covered concrete and a red neon sign, moving steadily toward a wide intersection. As the camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, the perspective opens up to the rain-soaked asphalt reflecting blue hotel signage and the glow of pedestrians' umbrellas. The scene then shifts back to a sheltered walkway on the opposite side, passing bright blue pharmacy signs and parked vehicles before turning toward a flight of concrete stairs. Finally, the camera ascends to an upper level, passing large digital billboards and purple neon signs to reach a high walkway with green railings that overlooks the neon-lit street and passing traffic below.
